title: Stick It - Hot Melt Glue Gun, UK Plug, Red, Including 2 Clear Glue Sticks, Dries Transparent, Hot Glue Gun Craft Tool For Card Making, Scrapbook Accessories, Crafting, Hobbies, School Supplies
features: USE Stick It hot glue gun makes the perfect crafting companion! Use with our hot glue sticks for a smooth experience, the hot glue gun sticks craft glue heats up in minutes for you to be working on your art kit. Hot glue gun for crafting home

TOOL hot melt glue guns are indispensable tools for anyone involved in crafting, DIY projects, or home repairs. Whether you’re a professional or a hobbyist, a hot melt glue gun can help you tackle a range of tasks efficiently and effectively

PROJECTS use on a variety of projects including wood glue, fabric glue, making it ideal for various crafting, DIY, and repair projects. Perfect for bonding wood, plastic, metal, glass, and fabric. They are perfect for crafting and minor repairs

REPUTATION hot melt glue guns are a staple in the crafting world. They are used for creating decorations, assembling models, and making handmade gifts. The quick drying time and strong bond are ideal for these activities

VERSATILE - Use the glue gun sticks to power the glue gun and watch your creativity flow. The glue sticks for glue gun are ideal to use with this tool, and can be used on an array of projects. From craft card, craft kit, diy kit, scrapbooks and more.
description: Product Description Docrafts Stick it Hot Melt Glue Gun comes fitted with plug. Docrafts Stick it easy trigger action of Glue Gun ensures a quick, clean adhesive application. Heat in just three to five minutes and guarantees a good flow control and melting performance. Retractable stand and heat insulated nozzle. When used with Stick it. Hot melt sticks the adhesive will bond in seconds. Can be painted when dry. Simply load the Stick it glue gun with a glue stick then prop it up on the retractable stand. Plug in the gun and allow to warm. Press the trigger carefully until the adhesive flows from the nozzle and apply in beads or lines to your surface. Quickly position the surfaces together and press them together firmly. After use, unplug the glue gun and leave it on the stand until cool. Fast heating in 3-5 minutes, ensuring good flow control and melting performance. Available in red colour. Box Contains 1 x Glue Gun
